stories.title: Client provides OHLCV data for technical analysis
stories.description: As an MCP client developer, I want to provide my own OHLCV data when calling technical analysis tools, so that I can use my broker's real-time data feed

acceptanceCriteria.description: Client can include OHLCV array in tool call arguments
Server processes client-provided data without fetching from external sources
Analysis results are identical whether data comes from client or server provider

stories.title: Client provides fundamental data for value analysis
stories.description: As a quantitative analyst, I want to provide custom fundamental metrics when calling value investment tools, so that I can include proprietary calculations

acceptanceCriteria.description: Client can include fundamentals object with P/E, EPS, ROE, etc. in tool arguments
Server validates fundamental data fields and types
Missing optional fields are handled gracefully with defaults

stories.title: View detailed tool schema requirements
stories.description: As an MCP client developer, I want to see exactly what data fields each tool requires, so that I can prepare the correct data structure

acceptanceCriteria.description: Tool schemas include complete field definitions with types
Required vs optional fields are clearly marked
Example payloads are provided for each tool

stories.title: Receive validation errors for malformed data
stories.description: As an MCP client developer, I want clear error messages when my data is invalid, so that I can quickly fix issues

acceptanceCriteria.description: Invalid data types trigger specific error messages
Missing required fields are identified in error response
Date format errors include expected format in message
Data range violations (e.g., negative prices) are caught and reported

stories.title: Continue using file-based provider
stories.description: As an existing user, I want my current file-based data configuration to keep working, so that I don't need to change my setup

acceptanceCriteria.description: Existing file provider configuration remains functional
Server automatically selects appropriate provider based on input
No breaking changes to existing tool interfaces

stories.title: Use Python example to integrate client data
stories.description: As a Python developer, I want example code showing how to fetch data and call Stock Buddy tools, so that I can quickly integrate

acceptanceCriteria.description: Python example demonstrates fetching data from Yahoo Finance
Example shows proper data formatting for tool calls
Error handling patterns are demonstrated

stories.title: Use JavaScript example for web integration
stories.description: As a web developer, I want JavaScript/TypeScript examples for browser-based integration, so that I can build web trading platforms

acceptanceCriteria.description: JavaScript example shows fetch API usage for data retrieval
TypeScript types are provided for data structures
Example handles CORS and authentication patterns

stories.title: Analyze 5 years of historical data
stories.description: As a quantitative analyst, I want to provide 5+ years of daily OHLCV data for backtesting, so that I can validate trading strategies

acceptanceCriteria.description: Server processes 1800+ OHLCV records without timeout
Memory usage remains under 512MB for large datasets
Response time stays under 5 seconds for full analysis

stories.title: Debug data validation failures
stories.description: As an MCP client developer, I want detailed error messages when validation fails, so that I can quickly identify and fix data issues

acceptanceCriteria.description: Error response includes field path of invalid data
Expected vs actual data type is shown in error
Suggested fix is included for common errors
Multiple validation errors are reported in single response

stories.title: Reference data contract documentation
stories.description: As an MCP client developer, I want comprehensive documentation of data contracts, so that I can implement correct data structures

acceptanceCriteria.description: Documentation includes all field names and types
Date/time format specifications are provided
Enum values are listed for categorical fields
Example JSON payloads are provided for each tool

stories.title: Prevent injection attacks via client data
stories.description: As a security engineer, I want client data to be sanitized before processing, so that injection attacks are prevented

acceptanceCriteria.description: String fields are sanitized to prevent code injection
Data size limits prevent memory exhaustion attacks
Nested object depth is limited to prevent stack overflow
Numeric fields are validated to prevent overflow/underflow

stories.title: Migrate from server to client data
stories.description: As an existing user, I want a migration guide to switch from server-fetched to client-provided data, so that I can upgrade smoothly

acceptanceCriteria.description: Step-by-step migration instructions are provided
Code examples show before and after configurations
Common migration issues and solutions are documented
Rollback procedure is documented in case of issues
